title: Date column
excerpt: Could you add an automation to a date column to log when a status change happened? I think this is a useful tool when tracking weekly people KPI

posts.author: laurenceangelb (Laurence Angel)
posts.cookedHtml: Could you add an automation to a date column to log when a status change happened? I think this is a useful tool when tracking weekly people KPI

posts.author: kaylak (Kayla K)
posts.cookedHtml:
@laurenceangelb Are you wanting to track the date of any status change, or is it specifically one status change, like when an item is moved to done?

If it is the second option, that can definitely be set up via automation, see screenshot below

image1197×319 8.68 KB

If you want to track this for multiple statuses, it would be possible with multiple date columns and an automation for each status change you want to track, but this could get a little messy.
